ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #12345678 is Confirmed
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. We are pleased to confirm your order #12345678 placed on 2026-04-14.

Order Details:
  • Item: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
  • Quantity: 1
  • Price: $79.99
  • Shipping: Standard (5-7 business days)

Your package will be dispatched on 2026-04-15 and should arrive by 2026-04-22.

If you have any questions or need to track your shipment, please visit <URL>.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update for Your Account
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our records indicate that your payroll information has not been updated for the current period. To avoid any delay in your salary, please verify and update your bank details within the next 48 hours.

1. Log in to the HR portal using your employee ID.
2. Navigate to "Payroll Settings".
3. Confirm your bank account information.
4. Submit the updated details for approval.

Failure to complete this process may result in a temporary hold on your salary disbursement. For security, do not share this email with anyone else.

If you believe this is an error, please contact the Payroll Department immediately at <URL>.

Sincerely,
John Doe
Director of Human Resources
XYZ Corporation
